queryParameters.parameters: ={{ Object.entries($json.params || {}).map(([key, value]) => ({ name: key, value: String(value) })) }}

assignments.name: manualRevenueEntry
assignments.value: { "source": "{{ $('Configure Revenue Tracking').first().source }}", "status": "manual_tracking_required", "tax_category": "{{ $('Configure Revenue Tracking').first().taxCategory }}", "revenue_type": "{{ $('Configure Revenue Tracking').first().revenueType }}", "timestamp": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}" }

assignments.name: financialReport
urgentTaxAlert
assignments.value:
🚨 *URGENT TAX PAYMENT ALERT* 🚨

*Quarterly Payment Due:* ${{ $('Compile Financial Report').first().tax_obligations.quarterly_payment_due.toFixed(2) }}
*Due Date:* {{ $('Compile Financial Report').first().tax_obligations.next_due_date }}
*Days Remaining:* {{ $('Compile Financial Report').first().tax_obligations.days_until_due }}

*Action Required:*
• Schedule quarterly tax payment immediately
• Review estimated tax calculations
• Consider consulting with tax professional

*Payment Methods:*
• IRS Direct Pay: https://www.irs.gov/payments/direct-pay
• EFTPS: https://www.eftps.gov
• Mail check to IRS processing center

*Important:* Late payments may incur penalties and interest charges.
